title: OACP Gate Request Payload (v1)
description: Payload schema for messages with payloadType = 'gate-request-v1'. Requests a validation gate run. Gate execution produces a typed ValidationResult; the response is a gate-result-v1 message. Per spec §11 (gate sketch) — detailed gate-execution semantics deferred to Tier 4.

gateId.description: Stable identifier of the gate to run (e.g., 'gate.jrxml.compile', 'gate.classification.confidence-threshold'). Gates are registered in the domain pack.

subjectRef.description: Reference to the artifact being validated.

subjectPayloadType.description: Optional. Declared payload type of the subject for routing/dispatch.

params.description: Gate-specific parameters. Schema is gate-specific; gates declare their parameter schemas in domain registration.

evidenceRefs.description: Optional. Pre-existing evidence the gate may consume (avoiding redundant collection).

policySnapshotId.description: Active policy snapshot under which the gate evaluates. Required at OACP-Governed+.
